title: Distich
content:
Your face upon a drop of purple wine
    Shows like my soul poised on a bead of blood.

    From the Turkic of Hussein Baikrani.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Edward Powys Mathers (As Translator), titled "Distich", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
